recent_excerpts: Rapid7's new AI assistant for SOC teams analyzes 22,052 security incidents to instantly summarize log data, explain alerts, and generate investigation queries, aiming to reduce analyst burnout.

A new analysis argues most AI-powered security operations center tools merely accelerate alert triage without reducing the underlying workload for analysts, failing to deliver on promises of true auto
SentinelOne outlines its AI-native security platform, leveraging on-device models and a global data lake to autonomously detect and respond to threats at machine speed.
